name: Carol's Sketti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can No Salt Added tomato sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in olive oil.
2. Add onions and sauté until they are somewhat tender.
3. Add leeks, garlic, canned tomatoes, tomato sauce, and chicken broth.
4. Stir in water, celery ribs, bell peppers, mushrooms, herbs, spices, parsley, sugar, and bay leaves.
5. Bring to a boil.
6. Reduce heat and simmer with the pot cover off for at least 6 hours, or longer until thickened.
7. Adjust seasonings to taste before serving.
8. Serve over spaghetti (or your choice of pasta).
